mode: ask
description: Update project docs and create a commit after meaningful work.

# Update Docs And Commit

Use the shared `update-docs-and-commit` workflow from `docs/assistant_workflows.md`.

If the user typed `/update-docs-and-commit`, treat it as a request for this workflow and update the docs before committing. Do not imply that this is a native Copilot slash command in this repository.
